title: TCS Nashik case: Nida Khan's bail plea to be heard by sessions court on May 25
description: The bail plea filed by Nida Ejaz Khan, accused in the TCS Nashik BPO religious conversion and sexual harassment case, will be heard by a Nashik court on May 25. Khan was arrested on May 7 from Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar after a sessions judge rejected her plea for anticipatory bail on May 2. She was remanded to judicial custody on May 11. She approached the court seeking bail on May 13.Additional Sessions Judge KG Joshi of the Nashik Road court sought response from the prosecution and posted
